## Take Decisions based 
on Meaningful Insights

.png)

Skill index of the organization

The metrics on skill proficiencies of your organization are available on the Employee Level, Team Level, Business Unit Level, and Organization level.

Book a demo

Benchmark your workforce

Compare the skills of your workforce with the industry standards, by using iMocha’s benchmarking solution. This benchmarking tells you the exact skill gaps that can be addressed by creating specific learning paths.

Talk to our experts

Integration with leading LXP & HRMS

Easily fit iMocha into your existing system. The solution seamlessly integrates with your LMS and LXP and fits into your existing L&D systems, without any headaches.

Read More
